summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Cross-Skill Scheduler multi-sheet Excel upload functionality and upload mode toggle. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend fully functional with new upload mode toggle, multi-sheet Excel support, and all existing features working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint (200 OK)
Default requirements data retrieval
Sample template download (.xlsx format with 3 sheets: English, Language, Shift Reference)
Multi-sheet Excel file upload processing via combined_file parameter
Separate Excel files upload processing (english_file, language_file)
Project-specific shifts validation (9 English: E05-E20, 5 Language: L07-L11)
Schedule generation with 212 agents and 14 shifts
Excel export for all types (shiftwise, roster, gap, sla)
Home page loads with upload panel showing upload mode toggle
Upload mode toggle: clicking 'Single File (2 sheets)' shows single combined file input
Upload mode toggle: clicking 'Separate Files' shows two separate file inputs
Download Sample Template button triggers .xlsx download
Run Greedy Scheduler with default data works in 'Single File' mode
Run Greedy Scheduler with default data works in 'Separate Files' mode
Summary cards display correctly: Total Agents (212), English Shifts (486), Language Shifts (574), Avg SLA (96.2%)
Tab navigation works for all 4 tabs (Shiftwise, Gap Dashboard, Agent Roster, SLA Analysis)
Shiftwise tab: Shows English shifts (E05-E20), Language shifts (L07-L11), subtotals, grand total
Shiftwise tab: Two bar charts render correctly for English and Language shifts
Gap Dashboard: Day selector + Project filter (Combined/English/Language) works
Gap Dashboard: Area chart and gap table update when switching day/project
Agent Roster: 212 agents with pagination (25 per page) and search functionality
SLA Analysis: Daily SLA table + hourly coverage charts with day selector
Export .xlsx buttons work on each tab
New Schedule button resets to upload view
